title: eupatorium sessilifolium var. sessilifolium
intro: Eupatorium sessilifolium var. sessilifolium, also known as Gray's thoroughwort, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It is a member of the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and to promote wound healing and immune function. Gray's thoroughwort is often consumed as a tea, taken as a tincture, or applied topically in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal benefits.
